description:
Name: Rita

Proficiency: Surprises

Birth: FCU

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein der Krieg
unit_description: The assistant scientist of the R&D Division "Bastet". She is Miss Conway's favorite assistant due to how compentent she is at simplifying Conway's projects into something logistically feasible to be fielded. By herself though, Rita is quite a quirky prankster who seems to be fond of throwing surprises to people. Literally. She is content with any loadout but its recommended to kit her squad with an SMG for self defense due to her skillset focusing on throwing grenades will always keep her close to the enemy.
